Operation 'editRackoot' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is vague and lacks domain context. Description is completely empty. Added clarity about what a rackoot is (collection), specified the path parameter requirement, explained the request/response schemas, and noted partial update support for better AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing rackoot (collection) with new information. Accepts a rackoot_id path parameter to identify which collection to update. The request body should contain the updated rackoot details (name, description, etc.) as defined in RackootCreate schema. Returns the updated RackootResponse object. Partial updates are supported - only provided fields will be modified.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague and lacks domain context. Description is completely empty. Added clarity about what a rackoot is (collection), specified the path parameter requirement, explained the request/response schemas, and noted partial update support for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'deleteRackoot' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary lacks domain terminology. Description is empty. Added context about what gets deleted (collection and its tiles), emphasized irreversibility as a critical side effect, specified the path parameter, and clarified the response type for AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a rackoot (collection) and all associated tiles within it. Requires the rackoot_id path parameter to identify which collection to delete. This action is irreversible. Returns a SuccessResponse confirming the deletion. All tiles contained in the rackoot will also be deleted.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks domain terminology. Description is empty. Added context about what gets deleted (collection and its tiles), emphasized irreversibility as a critical side effect, specified the path parameter, and clarified the response type for AI agent understanding.

Original summary is generic and lacks domain context. Description is empty. data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single tile (item) by its tile_id. Requires the tile_id path parameter to identify which tile to fetch. Returns a TileResponse object containing the tile's details including its content, metadata, and associated rackoot information.

message: Operation 'deleteTile' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary lacks domain terminology. Description is empty. Added context about what gets deleted and from where, emphasized irreversibility as a critical side effect, specified the path parameter, and clarified the response type for AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a tile (item) from its rackoot (collection). Requires the tile_id path parameter to identify which tile to delete. This action is irreversible. Returns a SuccessResponse confirming the deletion. The tile will be removed from its parent rackoot.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks domain terminology. Description is empty. Added context about what gets deleted and from where, emphasized irreversibility as a critical side effect, specified the path parameter, and clarified the response type for AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'createTile' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary lacks domain context. Description is empty. Added clarity about what a tile is (item) and where it's created (within a rackoot), specified the request schema requirements, explained the response structure including the assigned ID, and noted the immediate addition to the rackoot for AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new tile (item) within a rackoot (collection). The request body should contain the tile details as defined in TileCreate schema, including content, metadata, and the target rackoot_id. Returns a TileResponse object containing the newly created tile with its assigned tile_id and timestamps. The tile is immediately added to the specified rackoot.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks domain context. Description is empty. Added clarity about what a tile is (item) and where it's created (within a rackoot), specified the request schema requirements, explained the response structure including the assigned ID, and noted the immediate addition to the rackoot for AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'authorize' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is too generic. Description is completely missing. Added OAuth2-specific context, parameter requirements, redirect behavior, and expected response format to help AI agents understand the authorization flow and when to use this endpoint.

data.description_suggestion: Initiates the OAuth2 authorization flow for user authentication. Redirects the user to the authorization endpoint where they can grant permissions. Upon successful authorization, redirects back to the callback URL with an authorization code. Requires client_id and redirect_uri parameters. Returns a redirect response with authorization code in the callback URL.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description is completely missing. Added OAuth2-specific context, parameter requirements, redirect behavior, and expected response format to help AI agents understand the authorization flow and when to use this endpoint.

message: Operation 'getToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. Description is missing entirely. Added details about required parameters, response structure (TokenResponse schema), token usage requirements, and token lifecycle to enable AI agents to understand token acquisition and management.

data.description_suggestion: Exchanges authorization code or credentials for an access token. Accepts authorization_code, client_id, client_secret, and redirect_uri in the request body. Returns a TokenResponse containing the access token, token type, and expiration time. This token is required for authenticated API requests. Tokens expire after the specified duration and must be refreshed or re-requested.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description is missing entirely. Added details about required parameters, response structure (TokenResponse schema), token usage requirements, and token lifecycle to enable AI agents to understand token acquisition and management.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all rackoots (collections) belonging to the authenticated user. Requires valid OAuth2 authentication token. data.description_suggestion: Creates a new rackoot (collection) for the authenticated user. Accepts a RackootCreate object containing collection name, description, and configuration. Requires valid OAuth2 authentication token. Returns a RackootResponse with the newly created rackoot including its unique ID and metadata. The new rackoot is immediately available for adding tiles (items). Rackoot names must be unique within the user's account.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific rackoot (collection) by its ID. Requires the rackoot_id path parameter. Requires valid OAuth2 authentication token. data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing rackoot (collection) with new information. Accepts a rackoot_id path parameter to identify which collection to update. Partial updates are supported - only provided fields will be modified.

message: Operation 'deleteRackoot' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary lacks domain terminology. Description is empty. Added context about what gets deleted (collection and its tiles), emphasized irreversibility as a critical side effect, specified the path parameter, and clarified the response type for AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a rackoot (collection) and all associated tiles within it. Requires the rackoot_id path parameter to identify which collection to delete. This action is irreversible. Returns a SuccessResponse confirming the deletion. All tiles contained in the rackoot will also be deleted.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks domain terminology. Description is empty. Added context about what gets deleted (collection and its tiles), emphasized irreversibility as a critical side effect, specified the path parameter, and clarified the response type for AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Initiates the OAuth2 authorization flow for user authentication. Redirects the user to the authorization endpoint where they can grant permissions. data.description_suggestion: Exchanges authorization code or credentials for an access token. Accepts authorization_code, client_id, client_secret, and redirect_uri in the request body.
